title: GameStop Corp (GME) Q3 Earnings Preview: Loss Expected Amid Revenue Drop
text: GameStop was scheduled to release Q3 financial results on December 10, 2024, after market close. The company anticipated posting a loss of $0.03 per share, compared to breaking even in the same quarter the previous year. Expected Q3 revenue was $887.7 million, representing a substantial decline from $1.08 billion in the prior years third quarter. The article notes that GameStop has managed to beat earnings per share estimates in three of the last five quarters but has struggled with revenue, missing analyst expectations in four of the last five quarters. Stock Target Advisor presented a Slightly Bearish assessment, citing both strengths (positive free cash flow, high market capitalization) and weaknesses (high volatility, poor return on assets, overpricing). The average analyst target price was $17.75, suggesting potential 38.92% downside over 12 months, though the stock had gained 86.88% over the preceding year.
